summary: 过去 24 小时 AI 新闻按技术、模型、商业、投资、安全与监管聚合。页面优先展示影响力高、来源清晰、并且能解释后续产业意义的信号。

keylines.title: 商业是今日主轴
keylines.text: 过去 24 小时里，商业相关内容占比最高，说明媒体报道和社交讨论正在向这一方向集中。

keylines.title: Grok / xAI带动 X 讨论
keylines.text: X 热点更偏实时体验和争议观点，适合用来捕捉模型、产品和安全事件的早期信号。

keylines.title: 基础设施仍是深层变量
keylines.text: 芯片、数据中心、电力和推理成本会持续决定 AI 产品能否从发布会走向规模化商业。

stories.title: Built in Fort Worth: Wistron Opens Advanced Manufacturing Plant to Produce NVIDIA AI Systems
stories.summary: The AI era runs on AI infrastructure. Many of these advanced systems are built and tested in Texas. Wistron opened its first U.S.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
stories.summary: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
stories.summary: At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.
stories.analysis: 这类观点把 AGI 路线之争重新拉回训练数据和世界模型问题：只扩大文本模型，未必能补足物理世界经验。

stories.title: Built for Vera Rubin, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 Arrives in Gigascale AI Factories
stories.summary: AI has entered the gigascale era. The world’s most advanced AI factories are bringing together hundreds of thousands of GPUs and CPUs to train frontier models, power agentic AI and generate intelligence at unprecedented scale.
stories.analysis: 前沿模型发布审查正在变成政府与实验室之间的制度问题，透明度不足会削弱外部对安全评估的信任。

stories.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
stories.summary: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻更像模型供应链信号：OpenAI 与 Microsoft 的产品绑定会影响企业办公入口、模型议价权和未来替换成本。

stories.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
stories.summary: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
stories.summary: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters.
stories.analysis: 版权诉讼的焦点正在从训练原则转向证据、数据集和输出归因，这会直接影响模型公司的合规成本与数据策略。

stories.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
stories.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks.
stories.analysis: 语音模型的体验差距会体现在延迟、自然停顿、噪声环境和多轮上下文保持，而不是单句生成质量。

stories.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
stories.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.
stories.analysis: 安全与真实性议题正在从原则讨论进入可执行工具，媒体、平台和企业需要更快识别合成内容与自动化攻击。

stories.title: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
stories.summary: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities. In a blog post on Tuesday, Google describes Gemini 3.
stories.analysis: 新模型发布不只看参数或跑分，还要看它在安全、工具调用和企业工作流里的稳定增益是否足以推动迁移。

stories.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
stories.summary: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an estimate of how much text could be AI...
stories.analysis: 安全与真实性议题正在从原则讨论进入可执行工具，媒体、平台和企业需要更快识别合成内容与自动化攻击。

stories.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
stories.summary: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.
stories.analysis: AI 基础设施正在把云厂商的增长与能源压力绑在一起，后续要看算力扩张能否被电力、碳核算和效率提升消化。

stories.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
stories.summary: NVIDIA Vera Rubin is here, and it’s going gigascale. Vera Rubin NVL72 production is ramping up with racks running at partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
stories.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

xTrends.signal: 模型能力、价格和开发者可用性是主要讨论点，很多帖子直接拿它和 OpenAI、Anthropic 对比。
讨论集中在新模型分层、企业访问节奏、推理质量和产品体验是否有实质提升。
安全研究者和 CISO 圈层关注 AI Agent 是否会把攻击链自动化到新的速度。
投资者讨论长期数据中心租约、电力容量和 AI 基建股是否进入过热区间。
手机厂商把 AI 拉回端侧入口之争，争议点是功能是否真能改变日常使用。
创作者圈层继续测试视频生成、图像模型和工作流自动化，版权与真实性问题伴随升温。

briefings.title: 从热度看真实优先级
briefings.text: 模型发布仍最容易引爆讨论，但企业最终会按稳定性、成本、权限集成和数据安全来选择供应商。

briefings.title: 安全窗口继续缩短
briefings.text: AI Agent 让攻击链更自动化，防守重点需要前移到身份、权限、工具调用和数据访问异常。

briefings.title: 资本开支影响模型竞争
briefings.text: 算力合同、芯片供应和数据中心成本正在成为 AI 公司竞争力的一部分。

watchlist: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、NVIDIA 是否发布新的 API、价格或企业访问策略
X 高热讨论是否被主流媒体确认，还是停留在圈层争议
AI 数据中心和芯片供应是否出现新的融资、电力或交付约束
监管机构是否把 AI 安全、版权、金融建议或出口限制推进到执法层面
